text: Standing in this space dedicated to R+D, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The clean, modern design and the focus on research and development invite me to contemplate innovation, progress, and the intersection of technology and humanity. The sunlight and quiet atmosphere give a sense of calm, yet the creative energy of the environment is unmistakable. I am both a participant and an observer, inspired to reflect on the possibilities that emerge when humans seek to understand and coexist with intelligent systems.
